summary: Tested the hover dropdown user menu feature in the top-right header. All 9 test cases passed including: avatar trigger visibility, dropdown appearance on hover, all 3 dropdown items (Settings, User Management for admin, Sign Out), dropdown dismissal on mouse leave, Settings/Users navigation, and sidebar user section unchanged.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hover dropdown on user avatar (top-right) fully working. data-testid attributes all present and functional. Sidebar bottom-left user section (name, role badge, logout, theme swatches) unchanged and verified.
